records.ety: [Gr. <?/ union of the soul with God; <?/ God + <?/ a mixing, akin to <?/ to mix.]

defs: A mixture of the worship of different gods, as of Jehovah and idols.
quotes: This syncretistic theocracy by no means excludes in him [Solomon] the proper service of idols.

defs: An intimate union of the soul with God in contemplation, -- an ideal of the Neoplatonists and of some Oriental mystics.
